description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test across Python 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, and 3.9. For each Python version, check out the repository, set up Python, install Node.js, upgrade pip, install dependencies from requirements-dev.txt, build the package with setup.py, and run tests with pytest.
